name: markdown-site-preview
description: Browse your whole Markdown documentation like a website — Mermaid/PlantUML diagrams, tables, file tree and outline navigation.

commands.title: Markdown Site Preview: Open in Browser

enumDescriptions: Use enginePath if set (or a source checkout when the extension runs from one), else a previously installed engine, else install from the npm registry.
Only use enginePath (or a source checkout when the extension runs from one). Never contacts the npm registry (fully offline).
Skip local discovery and use (or install) the published @microwebstacks/md-render engine.
microwebstacks.preview.engineSource.description: Where the docs rendering engine is sourced from. For an installed extension, local discovery requires enginePath pointing at an astro-huge-doc checkout; 'auto' otherwise installs the engine from the npm registry on first use.

microwebstacks.preview.enginePath.description: Path to an astro-huge-doc repository checkout used as the engine. Highest priority in every engineSource mode. Only needed when the extension cannot infer the engine path.

microwebstacks.preview.docsRoot.description: Optional path to the documentation root inside the workspace. Defaults to manifest output.content when manifest.yaml exists, otherwise the workspace folder.

microwebstacks.preview.krokiServer.markdownDescription: Base URL of the Kroki-compatible server that renders diagrams (mermaid, plantuml, blockdiag). The preview POSTs diagram source to this URL. Use a local Docker Kroki (`http://localhost:18000`), the public service (`https://kroki.io`), or your organization's internal endpoint. Leave blank to fall back to the workspace `.env` or environment.
